name: Introduction to Data Journeys
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Data Journeys", "bold": true}, {"text": " also present a schematic for automation similar to "}, {"text": "Journeys", "bold": true}, {"text": "; however, while the Journeys are for individual contacts, the Data Journeys are for the management of bulk data. You can use Data Journeys to import or export a list, execute an SQL Query, or send a campaign to a group of contacts."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkX7R.05T5g00000BkX7REAV.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkX7R.05T5g00000BkX7REAV.png", "name": "Data_Journey.png", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 375, "width": 500}}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can use the following widgets to create a journey:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Data Journey Triggers:", "bold": true}, {"text": " Use a Data Journey Trigger widget to define the rules by which a contact enters the Data Journey. Every trigger has a different function and can be used to initiate the management of bulk data. "}, {"text": "Learn More", "bold": true}, {"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Data Journey Actions:", "bold": true}, {"text": " Use a Data Journey Action widget to define the course of action to be initiated; for example, start the import, trigger a Journey, toggle data Journey, FTP upload, HTTP post, secure list import, and so on. "}, {"text": "Learn More", "bold": true}, {"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Data Journey Filters:", "bold": true}, {"text": " Use a Data Journey Filter widget to add branching logic to the Journey. There are two filter widgets available to you: % Split and A/B Split. "}, {"text": "Learn More", "bold": true}, {"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Data Journey Delays:", "bold": true}, {"text": " Use a Data Journey Delay widget to delay the next step in a Data Journey for a certain time period. "}, {"text": "Learn More", "bold": true}, {"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Data Journey End:", "bold": true}, {"text": " Use the Data Journey End widget to terminate a Data Journey. "}, {"text": "Learn More", "bold": true}, {"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Managing Data Journeys"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can create a new Data Journey and manage your existing Data Journeys on the Data Journeys index page. To access the page, in Navigation, go to AUTOMATION and then select Data Journey."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The following is a screenshot of the Data Journeys index page:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkX7S.05T5g00000BkX7SEAV.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkX7S.05T5g00000BkX7SEAV.png", "name": "Data_Journey_Index_Page.png", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 525, "width": 700}}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Creating Data Journeys"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "In Navigation, go to AUTOMATION and then select Data Journey."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "On the Data Journeys index page, click New Data Journey. The New Data Journey dialog box opens.
"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkX7T.05T5g00000BkX7TEAV.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkX7T.05T5g00000BkX7TEAV.png", "name": "New_Data_Journey.png", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 375, "width": 500}}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "On the New Data Journey dialog box, enter a name for the Data Journey."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Optionally, select a date and time at which the Data Journey will be automatically disabled."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "The Enabled checkbox lets you specify whether you want your Data Journey to be live upon saving. The checkbox is selected by default."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Select the Allow Multiple Instances checkbox if you want the Journey to be triggered multiple times depending upon the trigger that you have selected."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click Save. You are directed to the canvas page where you can use the Data Journey widgets to define your Data Journey.
"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkX7U.05T5g00000BkX7UEAV.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkX7U.05T5g00000BkX7UEAV.png", "name": "Data_Journey_Canvas_Page.png", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 525, "width": 700}}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "On the left side of the canvas, you can see all the widget elements – Triggers, Actions, Filters, Delays, and End."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can simply click a widget element and it appears on the canvas. Then, double-click the widget to fill in the details. You can drag the widget anywhere along the dimension of the canvas.

The following screenshot shows an Export Finished trigger widget:
"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkX7Q.05T5g00000BkX7QEAV.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkX7Q.05T5g00000BkX7QEAV.png", "name": "Export_Finished_Widget.png", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 375, "width": 500}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "
"}, {"text": "📋 "}, {"text": "Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": "}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Remember to connect your widgets indicating the Data Journey flow."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "The connection of all widgets must terminate with an End widget."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "In a widget dialog box, the Detach button disconnects the node connected to the next widget element. And, the Remove button"}, {"text": " ", "bold": true}, {"text": "removes the widget from the Data Journey builder page."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "
"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Once you have set up your Data Journey, click Save.
"}, {"text": "📋 "}, {"text": "Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": You will not be able to save your Data Journey until all widgets have been filled in and have been all connected."}, {"text": "
"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
